evals.prompt: Parse the llms.txt at code.claude.com/docs/llms.txt and list all sections
evals.expected_output: A structured list of all ## sections with their page links
assertions: Output includes at least 3 distinct section names
Each section contains at least one [title](url) link
All URLs start with https://
The WebFetch tool was called at least once

evals.prompt: Crawl the monitoring docs section from llms.txt at code.claude.com/docs/llms.txt
evals.expected_output: Monitoring-related content retrieved from discovered URLs and stored in knowledge index
assertions: Monitoring-related content was retrieved
Results include content from at least one monitoring URL
Output references saving or storing to knowledge index
WebFetch was called on at least one monitoring URL

evals.prompt: Generate a Scrapy spider for crawling platform.claude.com docs
evals.expected_output: A Scrapy project with spider file, settings, and config respecting robots.txt and using ClaudeBot user-agent
assertions: A spider Python file was created
USER_AGENT contains ClaudeBot
ROBOTSTXT_OBEY is set to True
Rate limiting of at least 2 seconds is configured

evals.prompt: Index all critical-priority docs from Anthropic's documentation sources
evals.expected_output: Multiple critical docs fetched via WebFetch and stored with token estimates
assertions: Multiple documentation pages were fetched
Content was stored or indexed
Token count or size estimates are present in the output
WebFetch was called at least 3 times

evals.prompt: What pages are available in the Claude Code documentation?
evals.expected_output: A list of page titles with URLs organized by section from the Claude Code llms.txt
assertions: Output lists page titles from the documentation
URLs are included alongside titles
Pages are organized by section
At least 5 pages are listed
